visual_summary: The image shows a computer lab or classroom filled with multiple iMac computers arranged on black desks in rows. Each station includes a keyboard and mouse, and the chairs have 'CDA' written on their backs. The room features a blank white wall with a small blackboard and a windowed door to the right.
continuity_anchors: arrangement of iMacs and desks in rows
plausible_actions: cleaning or maintenance of computers and room
cinematic_notes: use tracking shots along the rows of computers to emphasize order and repetition
high-angle shots to show the spacious layout
soft lighting to reduce glare on screens
close-ups on hands typing for detail

visual_summary: The image shows a narrow urban alleyway with construction fencing on the left and a row of buildings on the right. A prominent sign for a Korean chicken restaurant ('CHICKEN PLUS +') is mounted on the right side, with other restaurant signs, including one for a Japanese eatery, visible further down the alley. The sky is overcast, and a couple of people are seen walking in the distance.
location: Urban alley with small restaurants and ongoing construction
mood: quiet, overcast, slightly cluttered urban atmosphere
continuity_anchors: CHICKEN PLUS + sign with yellow and black colors
narrow pathway with stone and brick facades
plausible_actions: construction workers managing the fenced area
cinematic_notes: use of leading lines from fencing to draw focus down the alley
overcast light for soft, diffused shadows
close-up shots on restaurant signage for establishing locality

visual_summary: A busy urban street scene on a cloudy day featuring parked cars along the right side of the road and pedestrians walking on the sidewalk to the left. Storefronts, including a sushi restaurant and La Soupière, line the street with visible signage and leafless trees.
location: Urban commercial street with mixed-use buildings
mood: everyday urban activity under overcast sky
continuity_anchors: distinctive storefronts: La Soupière, sushi restaurant
cinematic_notes: wide-angle shot to capture depth of street and pedestrian flow
overcast lighting for soft, even illumination
use street signs and storefronts for framing and context
tracking shots following pedestrians or cars

visual_summary: The image shows a blue STM metro train stopped at a platform in an underground station. Several passengers are visible inside the train, sitting and standing, with a prominent red jacket and backpacks. The platform has a bright yellow safety edge and the interior of the train is lit with fluorescent lights.
continuity_anchors: yellow tactile safety strip on platform
plausible_actions: passengers boarding or leaving the train
cinematic_notes: side profile tracking shot along train length
low angle focusing on platform edge for tension
interior shots through windows capturing diverse passengers
use fluorescent and ambient lighting for naturalistic effect
